name: wicked-garden
description: AI-Native SDLC — executable infrastructure, not passive guidance. Hooks enforce workflow gates, assemble context from memory and code search on every prompt, and persist decisions across sessions. 14 domains with 80 specialist agents cover the full lifecycle: signal-driven crew workflows with hard quality gates, 3-tier persistent memory with auto-consolidation, structural code intelligence, multi-model brainstorming, and domain experts for security, architecture, QE, product, data, and delivery. Zero external dependencies — runs standalone with local SQLite storage.

_future_userConfig._comment: Issue #335, #346: userConfig is not yet supported in plugin.json schema. When Claude Code adds userConfig support, move these fields out of _future_userConfig and into a top-level userConfig block. This would replace the manual /wicked-garden:setup flow.

storage_mode.description: Where to persist plugin state: local JSON files or SQLite with FTS5

onboarding_preference.description: How to handle first-run onboarding: auto-detect and configure, prompt user, or skip

jira_api_token._comment: Issue #346: When userConfig supports sensitive:true, this field should use it to store the token in the OS keychain rather than plaintext.
jira_api_token.description: Jira API token for issue sync (stored in OS keychain when sensitive flag is supported)

linear_api_token.description: Linear API token for issue sync (stored in OS keychain when sensitive flag is supported)

slack_webhook_url.description: Slack webhook URL for notifications (stored in OS keychain when sensitive flag is supported)

_future_channels._comment: Issue #348: channels field is not yet supported in plugin.json schema. When Claude Code adds channel support, move these declarations to a top-level channels block. Channels formalize external service connections with discovery and auth.

jira.description: Jira issue tracker for bi-directional sync with kanban domain

linear.description: Linear issue tracker for bi-directional sync with kanban domain

slack.description: Slack notifications for crew phase completions and gate failures

github.description: GitHub for issue triage, PR creation, and CI status

_future_lspServers._comment: Issue #347: lspServers field enables Language Server Protocol integration for richer code intelligence (go-to-definition, find-references, hover, diagnostics). When Claude Code adds lspServers support to plugins, investigate integrating with the search/CIQ domain for enhanced symbol resolution. Candidate servers: TypeScript (typescript-language-server), Python (pyright), Rust (rust-analyzer).

_future_outputStyles._comment: Issue #338: outputStyles field is not yet supported as a configuration block in plugin.json. When Claude Code adds outputStyles support, move these declarations to a top-level outputStyles block or the ./styles/ directory. These define domain-specific formatting for different work modes.

crew-phase.description: Structured output for crew workflow phases with phase headers, gate results, and evidence summaries

engineering-review.description: Code review output with severity-tagged findings, file annotations, and action items

delivery-report.description: Delivery metrics report with velocity charts, risk indicators, and forecast

qe-results.description: Test execution results with pass/fail counts, coverage, and failure analysis

brainstorm-synthesis.description: Jam session output with perspectives, convergence points, and actionable next steps
